zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Denison於1657年7月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦斯東寧頓時，她的父親George Denison36歲，母親Ann Borodell42歲。她於1678年6月5日與Lieutenant James Brown Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1741年5月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托阿特萊包洛享年83歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Denison于1657年7月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦斯東寧頓时，她的父亲George Denison36岁，母亲Ann Borodell42岁。她于1678年6月5日与Lieutenant James Brown Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1741年5月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托阿特萊包洛享年83岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯。

nameMeanings.name: Denison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of a Slavic patronymic from the personal name Denis or Denys , such as Russian Denisov or Ukrainian Denysenko or Denysevych.

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Denison was born on 5 July 1657, in Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, George Denison, was 36 and her mother, Ann Borodell, was 42. She married Lieutenant James Brown Jr. on 5 June 1678, in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 5 May 1741, in Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83, and was buried in Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Denison est née le 5 juillet 1657, à Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Denison, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ann Borodell, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Lieutenant James Brown Jr. le 5 juin 1678, à Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1741, à Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Denison am 5. Juli 1657 in Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Denison 36 und ihre Mutter Ann Borodell 42. Sie hat am 5. Juni 1678 in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Lieutenant James Brown Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1741 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Denison è nata il il 5 luglio 1657 nel Stonington, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, George Denison, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ann Borodell, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Lieutenant James Brown Jr. il 5 giugno 1678, nel Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 5 maggio 1741, nel Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Denisonが1657年7月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンストニントンで生まれた時，父George Denisonは36歳，母Ann Borodellは42歳であった。1678年6月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルスワンセアでLieutenant James Brown Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1741年5月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルアットレボロで83歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスプロヴィデンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Denison(이)가 1657년 7월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 스토닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Denison(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Borodell(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1678년 6월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 스완시에서 Lieutenant James Brown Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1741년 5월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 애틀레버로에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Denison nasceu em 5 de julho de 1657, em Stonington, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Denison, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ann Borodell, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Lieutenant James Brown Jr. em 5 de junho de 1678, em Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1741, em Attleboro, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Denison родилась 5 июля 1657 г. в местности стонингтон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени George Denison было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Borodell, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lieutenant James Brown Jr. 5 июня 1678 г. в местности свансеа, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 5 мая 1741 г. в местности аттлеборо, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности провиденс, провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Lieutenant James Brown Jr. el 5 de junio de 1678, en Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas.
